---
name: Feature suggestion
about: Something serai could do
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> Suggestions are welcome, with expectations set in
> [CONTRIBUTING.md → Suggesting features](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#suggesting-features):
> the bar for "I'll build this" is **"I want it for myself"**, the roadmap is
> private, and a "no" usually means the idea is good but not aligned with what
> this codebase is meant to be — exactly when forking makes sense.

## What are you trying to do?

<!-- The underlying goal, not the implementation you have in mind. It's often
     already possible a different way, or there's a simpler shape. -->

## What's in the way today

<!-- What you currently do instead, and where it falls down. -->

## What you'd picture

<!-- Optional. Rough is fine. -->

## Scale

<!-- Helpful context: roughly how many sessions and hosts, local vs remote,
     desktop vs mobile. serai's design leans on the fleet being large enough
     that "which of these needs me?" is the hard question. -->
